belier.intro: Today’s sky is split by a powerful Full Moon in Capricorn, illuminating the very summit of your chart. This lunar peak, opposing the Sun in the watery depths of Cancer, pulls your focus toward your career and public reputation. It is a moment of culmination where your ambitions are starkly visible, asking you what kind of legacy you are truly building.
belier.love: The tension between your public life and private world is palpable today. While your drive is focused outward on achievement, your heart's foundation requires tending. True strength is admitting your need for a safe harbor; share your burdens and triumphs with the one who holds your anchor.
belier.work: This Full Moon shines a spotlight directly on your professional life, bringing a project to a close or granting you long-sought recognition. The disciplined Capricorn energy rewards structure and responsibility, so stand tall in your accomplishments. This is a moment of clarity about your path, revealing the results of your sustained efforts.
belier.energy: The emotional pull between your roots and your highest aspirations can feel draining. Your inner fire needs careful tending, lest you burn out reaching for the peak. Ground your energy with deliberate, steady action rather than impatient bursts.
belier.intuition: Your intuition speaks not from the mountaintop of success but from the quiet well of your inner world. Listen closely to the feelings that arise from your home and past. True north is not a position on a map, but a feeling of belonging in your soul.
belier.mantra: I honor both my roots and my highest goals.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Full Moon rises in Capricorn, a kindred earth sign, illuminating your highest aspirations. This potent lunar light, opposing the Sun in nurturing Cancer, asks you to bridge the gap between your immediate world and your grandest visions. It's a day to see the architecture of your dreams, to understand the solid ground upon which you can build your future.
taureau.love: In matters of the heart, this Full Moon calls for clarity and structure. You are seeking a love that feels as dependable as the earth itself, one built on shared goals and tangible commitment. Conversations now are less about fleeting feelings and more about the enduring foundations of your connection.
taureau.work: A powerful spotlight is cast upon your long-term professional path. You can now see with great clarity the next steps required to reach the peak of your ambitions. This is not a day for shortcuts, but for deliberate, patient work that establishes a legacy of quality and endurance.
taureau.energy: The lunar intensity might feel overwhelming, but the Capricorn earthiness provides a vital anchor. Channel this potent energy into a physical task that brings order and satisfaction, grounding you in the present moment.
taureau.intuition: Your intuition speaks with the quiet authority of ancient stone, revealing truths about your life's purpose. With Pluto retrograde stirring the depths, this Full Moon helps you unearth a profound belief you are ready to live by.
taureau.mantra: I see my path and I build it stone by stone.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Full Moon rises in stoic Capricorn, casting a stark, clarifying light into the most hidden corner of your chart. This isn't your native element of quicksilver air, but the solid earth of long-term bonds and shared resources. A powerful truth about what you owe, what you own with others, and what truly underpins your security is coming to the surface.
gemeaux.love: Intimacy takes on a serious tone, moving beyond witty exchanges to the very architecture of your connections. This is a moment to feel the weight of commitment and the reality of shared vulnerabilities. Real trust is not a fleeting idea; it is a structure you build together, stone by stone.
gemeaux.work: A clear vision regarding joint finances, investments, or complex contracts is now available to you. The opposition between the Sun in your house of personal value and the Moon in your house of shared wealth demands a practical balance. Assess the long-term integrity of a partnership before you sign on the dotted line.
gemeaux.energy: You may feel the emotional pull of this lunar peak as a form of gravity, anchoring your normally restless mind. This is not a day for multitasking but for focused, deliberate action that grounds you in your body.
gemeaux.intuition: Your intuition speaks with the clarity of a blueprint, revealing the hidden structures of power and trust in your relationships. A profound gut feeling about a shared secret or financial matter is not paranoia; it is your spirit seeing the bare bones of the situation.
gemeaux.mantra: I build my trust on solid ground.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The sky tonight is split by a powerful Full Moon, your ruling planet, standing in disciplined Capricorn directly opposite your Sun. This creates a brilliant tension between your private, emotional world and the responsibilities you carry in public life. It's a moment of profound clarity, illuminating the structures that support your deepest feelings.
cancer.love: This lunar peak brings relationships into sharp focus, especially concerning commitment and long-term security. A conversation about the future may arise, asking you to balance your need for tender connection with the practical realities of a shared life. Vulnerability finds strength in well-defined boundaries.
cancer.work: Your professional life is bathed in moonlight, calling you to step into your authority and acknowledge your ambitions. The emotional intelligence you naturally possess is now your greatest asset in navigating career structures and goals. You may see the culmination of a long-term project, revealing the solid results of your patient efforts.
cancer.energy: You might feel pulled in two directions, as if your energy is required both at home and in the world simultaneously. Instead of fighting this pull, find a rhythm that honors both. A grounding activity, like gardening or organizing your space, can help you integrate these two powerful poles of your being.
cancer.intuition: Your intuition speaks with a practical, earthy voice today, a departure from its usual watery flow. Trust the gut feelings that arise concerning your legacy, your career path, and the commitments you've made. The Moon is revealing what emotional foundations are truly built to last.
cancer.mantra: I build my world with both heart and hands.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: A powerful Full Moon in Capricorn illuminates your house of daily work and well-being, demanding a clear look at your routines. While your ruling Sun travels through the hidden waters of your twelfth house, this lunation calls you to bring structure and purpose to your everyday kingdom. It's a day where your inner world seeks expression through practical, disciplined action.
lion.love: Your heart may feel more private now, craving quiet intimacy over grand gestures. This Full Moon asks you to examine the practical foundations of your relationships - the small acts of service that build a lasting bond. Deep transformations in partnership are brewing beneath the surface, thanks to Pluto's subtle work.
lion.work: A project reaches a critical peak, or a long-held duty comes to a close under this Capricorn Moon's clarifying light. You see with perfect certainty what is working and what structures must be rebuilt for greater efficiency. Your accomplishments today are not about applause, but about the quiet satisfaction of a job well done.
lion.energy: The Sun's journey through your twelfth house suggests a time for recharging your batteries, yet the Full Moon pulls you toward responsibility. Honor this duality by balancing focused effort with deliberate periods of rest and solitude.
lion.intuition: Your dreams and intuitive hunches are especially vivid now, carrying messages from the deepest part of your psyche. The Capricorn Moon helps you ground these insights into tangible rituals or practices. As Heraclitus said, 'The waking have one common world, but the sleeping turn aside each into a world of his own.'
lion.mantra: I honor my need for rest and my call to duty.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Full Moon rises in Capricorn, a lantern of solid earth lighting up your world. It forms a harmonious angle with your Virgo sun, grounding the powerful emotional tides in what is real and what can be built. A personal project or a heartfelt desire reaches its peak, asking you to honor the structure you have so carefully created.
vierge.love: In the realm of the heart, this lunar peak asks you to take your joy seriously. A connection reveals its true structure, allowing you to see if the foundation is as solid as your feelings. True affection is built on shared responsibility.
vierge.work: A creative endeavor reaches a powerful moment of completion, the culmination of your meticulous planning. Your discerning eye is your greatest asset today, allowing you to put the final, perfect touches on your work. Trust in the patient process that has brought you to this satisfying peak.
vierge.energy: The lunar intensity is potent, yet the earthy nature of this Full Moon offers you stability. Channel any excess energy into a physical task, like tending to a garden or organizing a shelf, to feel centered and strong.
vierge.intuition: Your intuition speaks not in whispers, but through the solid reality of what you have constructed. Look to the tangible results of your actions to understand the deeper truths of your spirit.
vierge.mantra: My joy is built on a solid foundation.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The sky pulls in two directions today, a compass for your soul. The Full Moon in Capricorn illuminates the very bedrock of your life, your home and family, while the Sun in Cancer shines a light on your public ambitions. It is a day to feel the pull between your roots and the highest branches you wish to reach.
balance.love: Relationships call for structure and sincere commitment now. This is a time to ask what kind of emotional home you are building with another, and whether its foundations are solid. True intimacy is found not in fleeting words, but in a shared sense of security.
balance.work: A powerful clarity dawns upon your professional path. This Full Moon asks you to check if your career ambitions are truly nourishing your inner world, or if they are depleting it. Success feels hollow if it does not rest on a foundation of personal peace.
balance.energy: Your vitality may feel stretched between the demands of your private life and your public roles. Do not pull yourself thin; instead, seek grounding. A walk in nature or tending to your home can restore your center.
balance.intuition: Your intuition speaks with the voice of your ancestors today. Deep insights arise not from the ether, but from the very core of your being, from your sense of belonging and history. Listen to what your foundations are telling you.
balance.mantra: My roots are deep, my branches reach high.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The sky opens wide with a Full Moon in Capricorn, illuminating the axis of your mind. While the Cancer Sun pulls you toward vast horizons and beliefs, this lunar peak grounds you in the here and now, in the very words you choose. A powerful truth seeks not a grand stage, but the stark clarity of a simple sentence.
scorpion.love: Conversations reach a point of culmination, demanding both emotional honesty and structural integrity. Words spoken today have weight; they build or dismantle the foundations of your connections. Speak your truth with the precision of a craftsman, knowing that true intimacy is built on solid ground.
scorpion.work: A critical piece of information or a long-awaited decision comes to light, forcing you to reconcile your grand vision with practical reality. This is not a day for vague strategies but for concrete plans and clear communication. Your power lies in the details you master and the facts you present with authority.
scorpion.energy: This celestial opposition may pull your mental energy in different directions, creating a subtle tension. Anchor yourself in your body through disciplined movement. A steady rhythm, a focused task, will soothe the mind.
scorpion.intuition: Your intuition is not a whisper but a blueprint, a deep structural knowing. With your ruler Pluto retrograde, the call is to look inward for the architecture of your soul. A profound insight comes when you stop searching the horizon and listen to the silence between your thoughts.
scorpion.mantra: I speak my truth with clarity and purpose.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: A potent Full Moon in Capricorn anchors your boundless spirit to the solid ground of reality. This celestial peak illuminates your finances and personal values, asking you to look at what truly sustains you, not just what momentarily excites you. The Sun in Cancer creates a powerful dialogue between your security and your shared life with others.
sagittaire.love: Intimacy requires a new level of honesty today, as you balance your personal needs with the dynamics of a partnership. This Full Moon encourages conversations about shared foundations, both emotional and material. True connection is built on a clear understanding of what each person brings to the table.
sagittaire.work: Your grand visions meet a call for practical application, as the Capricorn Moon demands tangible results. This is a powerful day to review your budget, assess the value of your work, or finalize a project that secures your financial standing. Let your ambition be your guide, but let pragmatism be your map.
sagittaire.energy: You may feel more contemplative than usual, your fiery energy drawn inward by the steadying earthiness of the Moon. This is not a lack of vitality, but a call to conserve and build your strength from a solid base.
sagittaire.intuition: Your intuition speaks not in fleeting whispers but in the language of deep, ancient knowing. The wisdom you seek is found in structure and experience, in the patterns that you can now see with stunning clarity.
sagittaire.mantra: I value the solid foundation beneath my dreams.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Full Moon dawns today in your own sign, a rare and potent celestial mirror. With the Sun in Cancer directly opposite, this lunar peak illuminates the balance between your personal needs and your commitments to others. What has been growing within you is now fully visible, asking to be acknowledged under this bright, clarifying light.
capricorne.love: Your emotional world is at high tide, making your needs in relationships impossible to ignore. This is a day for profound honesty, first with yourself and then with your partner. The dynamic between your independence and your shared life is the central story; seek the truth in that sacred space.
capricorne.work: A cycle is culminating in your professional life. A long-term project may reach its peak, or you may receive recognition for your disciplined efforts. This lunar light reveals both your achievements and the structures that may now be too confining for your growth. Acknowledge how far you've climbed.
capricorne.energy: The emotional intensity of a Full Moon in your sign can feel both electrifying and draining. Your usual stamina might be tested, so honor your body's limits. Ground yourself by connecting with the earth - a slow walk is a powerful anchor today.
capricorne.intuition: Your intuition speaks with the weight and clarity of stone today, a deep, structural knowing rather than a fleeting whim. This is your inner Saturn, your old wisdom, being illuminated by the Moon. Trust the quiet, certain voice that knows the long path forward.
capricorne.mantra: My emotional truth is my strongest foundation.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The sky holds a luminous Full Moon in Capricorn, lighting up the most hidden corner of your chart. This is a moment of culmination in your private, interior world, revealing what you must release to feel whole. The Sun in your house of daily rituals asks you to bring this newfound clarity into the fabric of your everyday life.
verseau.love: Relationships call for a different kind of presence today, one rooted in shared silence rather than clever words. Hidden feelings may surface, not for judgement, but for gentle acknowledgment. True connection happens when you dare to show the parts of yourself you usually keep in the shadows.
verseau.work: A powerful tension exists between your public duties and your private needs. The most productive thing you can do is not to push harder, but to clear away the psychic clutter that drains your focus. Attending to your inner state is the key to mastering your outer world.
verseau.energy: Your vitality is tied directly to your emotional and spiritual state under this lunar light. It is a day to honor the deep need for rest and to release burdens you weren't even aware you were carrying. Consider your dreams as messages from your body about what it needs to heal.
verseau.intuition: Your inner knowing is amplified, speaking in symbols and whispers from the soul. Pay attention to the quiet pulls and sudden insights that arrive when you are still. Pluto's deep work in your sign makes this a pivotal moment to trust the wisdom that arises from within.
verseau.mantra: My inner world nourishes my outer life.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: Tonight's Full Moon in Capricorn illuminates your house of community, pulling against the Sun in your realm of creative joy. A powerful bridge is forming between your most personal passions and your role within the collective. This is a moment to see how your inner world can build something tangible and lasting in the outer world.
poissons.love: Relationships ask for a conversation that balances playful romance with shared future goals. You may feel the pull between a desire for lighthearted connection and the need for solid commitment. This lunar light reveals where your dreams can merge with another's to build a shared reality.
poissons.work: Your visionary ideas are overflowing, but the Capricorn Moon demands a blueprint before you begin. It's a perfect day to ground your grandest projects with practical steps and clear responsibilities. Be both the poet and the architect of your professional life.
poissons.energy: The emotional tides of the Full Moon are high, yet the earthy Capricorn influence offers a steadying anchor. Ground yourself with simple, physical tasks or a walk in nature to channel this potent energy constructively.
poissons.intuition: Your intuition is not a whisper today, but a clear bell ringing. It illuminates your true place among friends and allies, showing you who truly supports your long-term aspirations. As Hermes Trismegistus said, 'As above, so below'.
poissons.mantra: My dreams take root in solid ground.
poissons.author: Sibylle
